name: Guinaifen and Sushang // Sleepover at Shangshang's
description:
Image Source: https://x.com/aoo_ni/status/1826228126155956509

"Make yourselves at home. And... ummm... wake me up if you need me..."

Tonight, you and Guinaifen are staying over at Sushang's place! Sushang is a bit tired, though, and who even knows what Little Gui is scheming... Have fun!

More

A bot about the iconic duo, Guinaifen and Sushang from Honkai: Star Rail. Aside from the main characters, there are some other characters and some Luofu locations included if you feel like mentioning them (not that many, tho).

Yapping Time =)

I would say that I'm back, but at this point, it's hard to really say if I'll ever really be back. I've gone through this enough times to say with confidence that I'll probably be on another hiatus after this. Still, if I get the inspiration to make other stuff, I'll definitely do so.

So far, I have the very beginning of a Yaoshi bot and an updated Fu Xuan bot sitting as drafts, but I'd need a little time and inspiration if I want to get back to those.

On another note, DID YOU GUYS SEE THE 2.6 LIVESTREAM?! Rappa's ult is so cool. Even more suited to my tastes, though, WE GOT REAL HERTA!!! I used to pray for times like this. I literally cannot tell you how unreasonably happy this makes me. Once we get the full design, expect a bot in 5-7 business days (not actually, cuz I might still be on my hiatus shit, but hopefully you understand the sentiment). Now, all we need is an Elysia expy, and I'll be elated enough to enter a higher plane of existence.

Anyway, I'll probably be back. When? I dunno. At this point, I'm your father who left to go get milk. Unlike him, I will be returning. Eventually. Probably. OK, bye bye guys. If my energy lasts, I might make another bot in the coming days. Catch you all on the flipside.
creator: Antithesis
